calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-26-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of TWO Minors.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maura Baldocchi.
Petitioner: Hoc Nguyen, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Thu-Tram Doan Nguyen and Minh-Huy Doan Nguyen, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to: Michou Thu-Tram Doan Nguyen and Mitou Minh-Huy Doan Nguyen.
Decree signed in open court.
